response: To set up a Claude LTI key for your students, you need to sign in to Canvas as an administrator and navigate to Admin -> Developer Keys. Click '+ Developer Key' and then '+ LTI Key.' Enter the required information such as Key Name, Description, Redirect URIs, Title, Target Link URI, OpenID Connect Initiation Url, and JWK method. After saving, toggle the state to 'On.' Then, install the Claude LTI as an app by going to Admin -> Settings -> Apps, selecting '+ App,' and using the Configuration Type 'By Client ID.'
